query:
INSERT INTO mlb_strikeout_props
  (gameId, side, pitcherName, pitcherHand, mlbamId, kProj, kLine, kPer9, kMedian, kP5, kP95,
   pOver, pUnder, modelOverOdds, modelUnderOdds, verdict, bestSide, bestMlStr,
   signalBreakdown, matchupRows, modelRunAt)
VALUES
-- PIT @ NYM (gameId=2250007)
-- Paul Skenes (PIT, away) vs NYM lineup: proj=5.36, line=5.5, P(over)=44.4% → +125, P(under)=55.6% → -125
(2250007, 'away', 'Paul Skenes', 'R', 694973,
 '5.36', '5.5', '7.78', '5.0', '2.0', '10.0',
 '0.4440', '0.5560', '+125', '-125',
 'UNDER', 'UNDER', '-125',
 '{"whiff_mult":1.097,"zone_mult":1.064,"arsenal_mult":1.052}',
 '[{"spot":1,"name":"Francisco Lindor","hand":"S","k_log5":22.4},{"spot":2,"name":"Juan Soto","hand":"L","k_log5":24.0},{"spot":3,"name":"Bo Bichette","hand":"R","k_log5":18.1},{"spot":4,"name":"Jorge Polanco","hand":"S","k_log5":19.5},{"spot":5,"name":"Luis Robert Jr.","hand":"R","k_log5":32.5},{"spot":6,"name":"Brett Baty","hand":"L","k_log5":31.3},{"spot":7,"name":"Marcus Semien","hand":"R","k_log5":21.8},{"spot":8,"name":"Carson Benge","hand":"R","k_log5":28.0},{"spot":9,"name":"Francisco Alvarez","hand":"R","k_log5":33.0}]',
 UNIX_TIMESTAMP(NOW()) * 1000),
-- Freddy Peralta (NYM, home) vs PIT lineup: proj=5.54, line=5.5, P(over)=49.1% → +104, P(under)=50.9% → -104
(2250007, 'home', 'Freddy Peralta', 'R', 642547,
 '5.54', '5.5', '8.43', '5.0', '2.0', '10.0',
 '0.4910', '0.5090', '+104', '-104',
 'PASS', 'OVER', '+104',
 '{"whiff_mult":1.071,"zone_mult":1.048,"arsenal_mult":1.021}',
 '[{"spot":1,"name":"Oneil Cruz","hand":"L","k_log5":35.4},{"spot":2,"name":"Brandon Lowe","hand":"L","k_log5":33.6},{"spot":3,"name":"Bryan Reynolds","hand":"S","k_log5":33.1},{"spot":4,"name":"Marcell Ozuna","hand":"R","k_log5":30.3},{"spot":5,"name":"Ryan O Hearn","hand":"L","k_log5":26.1},{"spot":6,"name":"Jared Triolo","hand":"R","k_log5":25.5},{"spot":7,"name":"Spencer Horwitz","hand":"L","k_log5":23.4},{"spot":8,"name":"Nick Gonzales","hand":"R","k_log5":22.8},{"spot":9,"name":"Henry Davis","hand":"R","k_log5":33.3}]',
 UNIX_TIMESTAMP(NOW()) * 1000),
-- CWS @ MIL (gameId=2250008)
-- Shane Smith (CWS, away) vs MIL lineup: proj=3.28, line=3.5, P(over)=40.8% → +145, P(under)=59.2% → -145
(2250008, 'away', 'Shane Smith', 'R', 681343,
 '3.28', '3.5', '5.57', '3.0', '1.0', '7.0',
 '0.4080', '0.5920', '+145', '-145',
 'UNDER', 'UNDER', '-145',
 '{"whiff_mult":1.021,"zone_mult":1.006,"arsenal_mult":1.002}',
 '[{"spot":1,"name":"Brice Turang","hand":"L","k_log5":24.6},{"spot":2,"name":"William Contreras","hand":"R","k_log5":19.1},{"spot":3,"name":"Christian Yelich","hand":"L","k_log5":27.8},{"spot":4,"name":"Andrew Vaughn","hand":"R","k_log5":18.7},{"spot":5,"name":"Jake Bauers","hand":"L","k_log5":29.1},{"spot":6,"name":"Sal Frelick","hand":"R","k_log5":14.2},{"spot":7,"name":"David Hamilton","hand":"R","k_log5":25.3},{"spot":8,"name":"Garrett Mitchell","hand":"R","k_log5":33.3},{"spot":9,"name":"Joey Ortiz","hand":"R","k_log5":15.3}]',
 UNIX_TIMESTAMP(NOW()) * 1000),
-- Jacob Misiorowski (MIL, home) vs CWS lineup: proj=3.76, line=4.0, P(over)=32.6% → +207, P(under)=67.4% → -207
(2250008, 'home', 'Jacob Misiorowski', 'R', 694819,
 '3.76', '4.0', '7.20', '4.0', '1.0', '7.0',
 '0.3260', '0.6740', '+207', '-207',
 'UNDER', 'UNDER', '-207',
 '{"whiff_mult":1.065,"zone_mult":1.025,"arsenal_mult":1.031}',
 '[{"spot":1,"name":"Chase Meidroth","hand":"L","k_log5":21.9},{"spot":2,"name":"Colson Montgomery","hand":"L","k_log5":40.9},{"spot":3,"name":"Miguel Vargas","hand":"R","k_log5":25.6},{"spot":4,"name":"Andrew Benintendi","hand":"L","k_log5":26.1},{"spot":5,"name":"Austin Hays","hand":"R","k_log5":35.8},{"spot":6,"name":"Munetaka Murakami","hand":"R","k_log5":31.7},{"spot":7,"name":"Everson Pereira","hand":"R","k_log5":50.1},{"spot":8,"name":"Edgar Quero","hand":"R","k_log5":25.6},{"spot":9,"name":"Luisangel Acuna","hand":"R","k_log5":27.7}]',
 UNIX_TIMESTAMP(NOW()) * 1000),
-- WSH @ CHC (gameId=2250009)
-- Cade Cavalli (WSH, away) vs CHC lineup: proj=2.29, line=2.5, P(over)=39.4% → +154, P(under)=60.6% → -154
(2250009, 'away', 'Cade Cavalli', 'R', 676917,
 '2.29', '2.5', '4.20', '2.0', '0.0', '5.0',
 '0.3940', '0.6060', '+154', '-154',
 'UNDER', 'UNDER', '-154',
 '{"whiff_mult":1.009,"zone_mult":0.996,"arsenal_mult":1.013}',
 '[{"spot":1,"name":"Michael Busch","hand":"L","k_log5":19.8},{"spot":2,"name":"Alex Bregman","hand":"R","k_log5":11.3},{"spot":3,"name":"Ian Happ","hand":"S","k_log5":18.7},{"spot":4,"name":"Pete Crow-Armstrong","hand":"L","k_log5":20.3},{"spot":5,"name":"Nico Hoerner","hand":"R","k_log5":6.0},{"spot":6,"name":"Carson Kelly","hand":"R","k_log5":15.4},{"spot":7,"name":"Moises Ballesteros","hand":"L","k_log5":15.2},{"spot":8,"name":"Dansby Swanson","hand":"R","k_log5":21.4},{"spot":9,"name":"Matt Shaw","hand":"R","k_log5":17.5}]',
 UNIX_TIMESTAMP(NOW()) * 1000),
-- Matthew Boyd (CHC, home) vs WSH lineup: proj=3.61, line=3.5, P(over)=47.6% → +110, P(under)=52.4% → -110
(2250009, 'home', 'Matthew Boyd', 'L', 571510,
 '3.61', '3.5', '5.41', '3.0', '1.0', '7.0',
 '0.4760', '0.5240', '+110', '-110',
 'PASS', 'OVER', '+110',
 '{"whiff_mult":1.018,"zone_mult":1.008,"arsenal_mult":0.996}',
 '[{"spot":1,"name":"James Wood","hand":"L","k_log5":28.9},{"spot":2,"name":"Andres Chaparro","hand":"L","k_log5":27.1},{"spot":3,"name":"Brady House","hand":"R","k_log5":27.1},{"spot":4,"name":"Daylen Lile","hand":"L","k_log5":14.1},{"spot":5,"name":"Joey Wiemer","hand":"R","k_log5":36.1},{"spot":6,"name":"CJ Abrams","hand":"L","k_log5":17.5},{"spot":7,"name":"Nasim Nunez","hand":"S","k_log5":20.7},{"spot":8,"name":"Keibert Ruiz","hand":"S","k_log5":9.2},{"spot":9,"name":"Jacob Young","hand":"R","k_log5":16.9}]',
 UNIX_TIMESTAMP(NOW()) * 1000)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  pitcherName=VALUES(pitcherName), pitcherHand=VALUES(pitcherHand), mlbamId=VALUES(mlbamId),
  kProj=VALUES(kProj), kLine=VALUES(kLine), kPer9=VALUES(kPer9), kMedian=VALUES(kMedian),
  kP5=VALUES(kP5), kP95=VALUES(kP95), pOver=VALUES(pOver), pUnder=VALUES(pUnder),
  modelOverOdds=VALUES(modelOverOdds), modelUnderOdds=VALUES(modelUnderOdds),
  verdict=VALUES(verdict), bestSide=VALUES(bestSide), bestMlStr=VALUES(bestMlStr),
  signalBreakdown=VALUES(signalBreakdown), matchupRows=VALUES(matchupRows),
  modelRunAt=VALUES(modelRunAt), updatedAt=NOW();
